productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Grey Brasilia Medium Backpack
description: Style Note A backpack easily distributes the weight across your shoulders and back, making it easy to carry loads while keeping you looking cool and confident. Fill this trendy nike backpacks with your sportswear when you're heading to the field or gym, or use it on a trek in the great outdoors, and enjoy the ample storing space for all your gear. Product Details A grey and black backpack with a nike swoosh in the front Two padded shoulder straps, one short handle on top and padded back One main zippered compartment One zippered compartment in front with organiser pockets Material and Care 20% nylon and 80% polyester exterior, 100% polyester lining Do not machine wash or dry clean Do not bleach or iron Wipe with a damp cloth when necessary and line dry Size Height: 45 cm Width: 32 cm Depth: 16 cm
